last_hatch.name: Cinder
last_hatch.flavor: The shell cracked once. Then went still. You leaned in — and a paw shot out and bopped you on the nose. Cinder tumbled free, looked around at the world, and immediately started batting at everything in reach. A playful cat. Already causing problems.

activity_log.event: Cinder hatched nearby. Ember opened one eye, decided it wasn't a threat, and went back to digesting.
Ember was fed a big meal. Ate carefully, then licked the bowl clean. Mood lifted to content.
Ember refused to play. Too tired. Flopped over dramatically.
Ember collapsed after an exhausting flight. Energy fully depleted.
Pebble heard Cinder hatch and immediately retreated to the furthest corner of the room.
Pebble sensed the new hatchling and hid under a rock. Shy recognizes shy.
Pebble played hard, then crashed immediately after. Energy depleted.
Baby_EmbPeb immediately tried to wrestle Cinder. Cinder bopped them on the snout. They are now best enemies.
Baby_EmbPeb went absolutely feral during play. Something got knocked over.
Cinder chased Wisp through the whole forest. Wisp loved every second of it. Bond: 38.
Played with Cinder until they both collapsed in a heap.
Cinder approached. Wisp froze — then cautiously sniffed back. Something stirred.
Wisp watched Cinder hatch from across the room, too nervous to approach.
Cinder chased Wisp for the third time today. Wisp keeps running. Cinder keeps following. Bond: 38.
Played with Wisp until they both collapsed. Cinder purred.
Cinder spotted the shy little dragon and immediately decided to befriend it. Whether Wisp liked it or not.
Cinder hatched. Looked around. Saw Wisp. Made a decision.
